vocab.meaning: xé toạc không gian (âm thanh cực kỳ lớn và đột ngột)
vocab.example: Occasionally, the thunderous roar of a jet engine will split the air, momentarily halting all conversation.

vocab.meaning: làm ai đó ghê răng, khó chịu phát rùng mình
vocab.example: The screeching sound of metal scraping against the pavement from the nearby workshop really sets my teeth on edge.

vocab.meaning: hết công suất, âm lượng tối đa
vocab.example: Every weekend, my neighbors seem to enjoy playing techno music at full blast, which can be quite disruptive.

vocab.meaning: sự yên tĩnh bình lặng (thường dùng khi khao khát thoát khỏi tiếng ồn)
vocab.example: After a long day of enduring the city's clamor, I desperately need some peace and quiet to recharge.

vocab.meaning: đến mức gây xao nhãng, không thể tập trung
vocab.example: The rhythmic tapping from the office upstairs is annoying to the point of distraction when I'm writing reports.

vocab.meaning: nghe được cả tiếng pin rơi (cực kỳ yên tĩnh)
vocab.example: In the dead of night, it’s so silent in my suburb that you could almost hear a pin drop.

vocab.meaning: đâm vào tai (âm thanh chói lót, nhức tai)
vocab.example: The high-pitched wail of ambulance sirens often pierces the ears of anyone walking along the main road.

vocab.meaning: làm ai đó trằn trọc mất ngủ
vocab.example: The incessant barking of the dogs in the alleyway is enough to keep anyone awake at night.

vocab.meaning: phá vỡ bầu không khí (thường là sự yên tĩnh hoặc một khoảnh khắc đẹp)
vocab.example: I was enjoying the tranquil morning until the sudden honking of a car horn broke the spell.

vocab.meaning: một mớ âm thanh hỗn tạp, chói tai
vocab.example: The intersection near my house is a constant cacophony of sound, featuring everything from engine revs to shouting vendors.
